matrix.source_summary: feature pages for Brex, Ramp, Pleo, Airbase, Spendesk; Concur integrates cards via bank feeds but does not clearly issue its own; Coupa lists virtual cards but not physical explicitly
product feature pages for Ramp, Expensify, Pleo, Navan, Coupa, Airbase, BILL, Spendesk all name virtual cards explicitly
feature pages for Brex (vendor-specific cards + merchant card controls), Pleo (vendor cards + vendor locks), Airbase (per-vendor virtual card limits) explicitly confirm
core feature confirmed across all ten competitor product pages
product pages for Expensify (SmartScan), Pleo (OCR), Ramp (auto-receipt matching), Airbase (receipt capture + OCR), Spendesk (OCR) all name it explicitly
feature pages for Expensify, Pleo, Navan, Concur (via Motus), Spendesk all name mileage tracking explicitly
feature pages for Expensify (per diem configuration), Navan (per diem calculator), Spendesk (per diem) explicitly confirm; majority of sources silent
confirmed across all ten competitor product/feature pages; Brex and Ramp call out global reimbursements specifically
product pages for Brex, Ramp, Expensify, Coupa, Airbase, BILL, Spendesk all name bill pay explicitly; Navan mentions back-office capabilities without specifics
named explicitly by Brex (AI invoice entry), Ramp (invoice OCR), Concur, Coupa, Airbase, BILL (invoice coding agent), Spendesk (AP + procure-to-pay)
product pages for Ramp, Coupa, Airbase, BILL, Spendesk all name POs and requisitions explicitly; Expensify is the clear absence
feature pages for Ramp (three-way matching), Concur (three-way match), BILL (3-way PO matching) name it explicitly; Coupa confirmed as procurement platform
product pages for Ramp (free wires + same-day ACH), Airbase (ACH + check payments), BILL (ACH payments) confirm explicitly; Pleo and Spendesk are Europe-first with partial US payment method coverage
product pages for Brex (local currency wires, 120+ countries), Airbase (international wire payments), BILL (international payments), Spendesk (international payments) all confirm explicitly

product pages for Brex (50+ local-currency cards), Ramp (30+ currencies), Airbase (multi-currency support explicit), Spendesk (European multi-currency) confirm strongly; Expensify and BILL reference international payments without explicit multi-currency labeling
feature lists for Brex (live budgets), Ramp (budgets module), Concur (explicit feature), Airbase, BILL, Spendesk
Ramp (spend limits + card issuing controls), Pleo (card limits per purchase), Brex (merchant card controls + spend limit chains), Airbase (per-vendor virtual card limits)
only Ramp (auto-lock cards) and Pleo (expense card freeze) explicitly name this feature in provided source data
Brex (checking + treasury/money market + vault), Ramp (treasury investment account + FDIC cash account), Coupa (treasury management + cash & liquidity)
BILL ($1K–$5M credit lines), Brex (30x higher limits), Pleo (overdraft/credit facility up to £500K), Ramp (competitive credit limits)
Brex (card rewards/cash back), Pleo (cashback up to 0.75% monthly), Expensify (cash back reduces subscription bill), BILL (rewards program), Navan Rewards
named explicitly across nearly all sources; Brex (99% compliance + dynamic review chains), Concur (spending policy enforcement), Airbase (spend policy enforcement), Pleo (spending guidelines)
Expensify (expense categories and tags), Pleo (custom categories and tags + auto-categorisation), Spendesk (custom categories and tags) — others offer GL coding/auto-coding instead
Brex (VAT documentation), Pleo (auto-VAT split), Concur (global tax management + tax assurance), Ramp (auto tax capture and coding); Airbase/BILL limited to US 1099/W-9
Airbase (explicit vendor management), Coupa (supplier risk & performance management), Ramp (procurement module + AI vendor compliance reviews), Pleo (advanced vendor insights + renewal management)
only Pleo (subscription management + SaaS subscription monitoring + renewal management) and Spendesk (subscription management + SaaS subscription monitoring) have explicit features
Airbase (explicit audit trail feature), Concur (Intelligent Audit + Verify features) — most sources do not name this explicitly in provided data
Concur (Concur Detect + duplicate payment prevention), Airbase (duplicate detection + anomaly detection), Ramp (automated fraud checks), Coupa (fraud detection), Spendesk (fraud detection)
universal across all ten sources; Brex (1,000s of ERPs two-way sync), Ramp (200+ including all major ERPs), Concur (300+ pre-built connectors)
named explicitly by Ramp (feature + integration list), Expensify (QBO + Desktop), Pleo, Concur, Airbase, BILL (full QB suite), Spendesk; Brex lists only generic accounting software
ramp, expensify, pleo, concur, airbase, bill, spendesk integrations lists
brex, navan, bill features; expensify/pleo/concur/airbase/spendesk named integrations
ramp, airbase, bill, spendesk features and integrations lists
brex (Brex API), concur (open api), airbase, bill, spendesk features; ramp via MCP/CLI
expensify features (third-party card feeds); concur features (bank card feeds)
concur features page; ramp integrations (Egencia, Corporate Traveler)
brex (GL coding automation), ramp, expensify, pleo, navan, bill, spendesk features
brex, ramp, expensify, pleo, navan, concur, airbase, spendesk features
brex (ai expense assistant), navan (Navan Edge), concur (agentic AI assistant), coupa (Ask Cassie), bill (Bill Assistant)
ramp features page only
brex (ai compliance audit detection), ramp (proactive policy insights), concur (intelligent audit, Concur Detect)
navan (ai-powered spend insights), pleo (ai spending insights), concur (intelligence reporting), coupa, spendesk features
airbase (anomaly detection), concur (Concur Detect fraud); partial via fraud detection in ramp, expensify, coupa, spendesk

matrix.feature: agentic ai and autonomous spend management
matrix.source_summary: coupa features (agentic AI / autonomous spend), ramp differentiators (AI agents 24/7), concur features (agentic AI travel assistant)
expensify, navan, coupa, airbase, bill, spendesk features lists
Navan and Airbase features lists name SCIM explicitly; Spendesk lists Okta/Azure AD/Entra ID integrations without naming SCIM
Airbase names role-based access control directly; BILL names custom user roles; Pleo names distinct named roles (internal controller, external bookkeeper)
explicit in Brex (unlimited entities), Pleo (Advanced tier+), Airbase, BILL, and Spendesk features lists; Ramp implied at enterprise tier only
only Expensify explicitly names delegated access and vacation delegate in its features list
BILL explicitly lists dual control; Spendesk explicitly lists multi-factor authentication; Ramp payment release approvals implies dual-approval but not named
Pleo names external bookkeeper access explicitly in features; BILL names accountant console explicitly in features
Airbase and BILL both explicitly name 1099 tax filing support and W-9 collection/agent in their features lists
Airbase explicitly lists custom fields; most others offer custom categories, tags, or report fields which partially cover this
Spendesk explicitly lists ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, GDPR, PSD2 certifications; BILL mentions bank-level security; no other source confirms named certs

matrix.feature: real-time spend visibility and transaction alerts
matrix.source_summary: explicit in Ramp (transaction alerts and flags), Navan (real-time expense visibility + out-of-policy flagging), Pleo (real-time expense overview + expense flagging), Spendesk (real-time spend monitoring)
only Ramp explicitly names missing receipt affidavits in its features list; no other source surfaces this term
Pleo and Spendesk both explicitly list Google Pay and Apple Pay in features and integrations; no other source confirms
Expensify explicitly lists chat and expense/report-level commenting; Ramp has Slack expense submission; Airbase has Slack approvals integration
BILL explicitly names csv import/export in features; Pleo lists bank statement and transaction statement exports; Spendesk lists custom accounting exports
explicit in Brex (gl coding automation, one-click accruals), Ramp (ai coding for accounting fields), Airbase (accounting automation and gl coding), Spendesk (accounting automation)
explicitly named in features list for all 10 competitors
ramp 'auto-receipt collection and matching', spendesk 'receipt matching', brex 'automated receipt capture', concur 'expenseit'
bill.com 'auto-charge and auto-pay', ramp 'automated batch payments', expensify 'automated bill payments', coupa 'payments'
ramp features list 'auto tax capture and coding', concur 'tax assurance' and 'global tax management', pleo 'auto-vat split'
ramp features list 'automated po creation', coupa 'po collaboration' and procurement suite, airbase 'purchase orders' without explicit automation
brex features list and differentiators 'one-click accruals' and 'daily close capability via one-click accruals'; absent from all others
spendesk 'e-invoicing' explicitly listed, expensify 'invoicing', bill.com 'invoicing', coupa 'invoicing / ap automation'
ramp 'parallel approvers', brex 'advanced approvals with spend limit chains', airbase 'multi-level approval workflows', spendesk 'advanced approval workflows'
pleo 'teams management' and 'cost centers', spendesk 'cost centers' and 'multi-entity management', brex 'multi-entity management'
navan 'guest booking' and ramp 'guest travel bookings' explicitly listed; airbase 'non-employee / contractor spend' covers adjacent use case
pleo 'external bookkeeper access' explicitly listed; bill.com references accountant firm network; most others not confirmed
present in all 10 competitors' feature lists; coupa 'spend analysis', navan 'advanced analytics', airbase 'spend analytics and reporting'
ramp 'custom reports', expensify 'custom insights and reporting', navan 'customizable reports', concur 'intelligence reporting'
bill.com 'cash flow forecasting' explicitly listed, coupa 'cash & liquidity management', concur 'real-time cash flow visibility'
navan 'sustainability tracking', concur 'sustainable travel management'; coupa via ESG app marketplace integrations only
pleo.io explicitly lists 'bank statement export, transaction statement export'; all others confirmed via ERP sync + reporting feature listings
navan 'advanced analytics + AI spend insights'; concur 'intelligence reporting + consultative intelligence'; coupa 'spend analysis + agentic AI'; ramp 'AI expense reviews + proactive policy insights'
brex, expensify, navan, concur, airbase, bill.com, spendesk all explicitly list 'mobile app'; pleo confirmed via Apple Pay + Google Pay feature listing

matrix.feature: mobile receipt scanning and expense submission
matrix.source_summary: expensify 'SmartScan'; concur 'ExpenseIt + receipt auto-capture'; ramp 'auto-receipt collection + SMS submission'; spendesk 'OCR receipt scanning'; navan 'receipt scanning + mobile app'
brex 'in-app travel booking'; navan 'flight/hotel/car/train booking'; concur 'travel booking + TMC/GDS integration'; pleo and spendesk via TravelPerk integration only

ramp 'travel policies'; expensify 'customizable travel rules'; navan 'policy and approval workflows'; brex 'group travel and advanced travel rules'; concur 'spending policy enforcement + managed rate administration'
ramp '24/7 travel phone support' explicit; expensify '24/7 travel support' explicit; navan '24/7 travel support agents' explicit; brex partial via Navan partnership; concur partial via TMC platform

matrix.feature: duty of care and traveler tracking
matrix.source_summary: navan 'duty of care / traveler tracking' explicit; concur 'duty of care' explicit + crisis integrations (Alert Media, Crisis24, Global Rescue, International SOS)
concur 'pre-trip approval' explicit; expensify 'trip approvals' explicit; navan 'policy and approval workflows' for travel; others via general approval workflow features
brex 'travel itinerary management' explicit; navan 'itinerary email automation + calendar syncing'; concur 'TripIt integration + TripLink'
navan 'corporate negotiated rates' explicit; concur 'managed rate administration'; brex partial via Navan partnership; ramp partial via Corporate Traveler + Egencia integrations
navan 'Navan Rewards + loyalty accumulation' explicit; concur 'airline/hotel loyalty account sync'; ramp via AAdvantage Business integration; others via card cashback/rewards programs only
navan 'emergency travel support' explicit; concur partial via crisis management integrations (Alert Media, Crisis24, Global Rescue, iSOS); ramp partial via 24/7 phone support
